classes.reasoning: The document explicitly identifies itself as 'INVESTIGATOR BROCHURE' in the title and footer. It contains comprehensive information about the investigational drug BRC-209 (Velagostat), including efficacy data, safety profiles, pharmacogenomics, and dosing guidance—all characteristic elements of an Investigator Brochure.

summary: This is Edition 2 of the Investigator Brochure for BRC-209 (Velagostat), an investigational therapeutic sponsored by Biorce Therapeutics. The document provides updated efficacy and safety data from an 18-month Phase II extension study (n=94), new biomarker findings (plasma p-tau 181, NfL), pharmacogenomic guidance for CYP2C19 poor metabolizers, and falls risk assessment to support investigators in conducting clinical trials with this compound.
references_to: Edition 1, dated 10 January 2021 (noted as initial IB with date error comment)
